$comment: scripts/Route12SuperRodHouse.asm — the GURU's brother's SUPER ROD (the ask-gift flow; give_item's abort = the retired _gift, re-offer).

then.text:
Hello there,
{player}! Use the SUPER ROD
in any water!
You can catch
better POKéMON.

else.text:
